TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kakawasan, title = Kakawasan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kakawasan} }

S.FORM: == O ngangan no Kakawasan == Itiraay i Fo-fong-li no Posong . Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Kakawasan a niyaro', 180 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 478 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 77% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 367 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 23% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 111 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 72%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 2%, roma 1%. O kaitiraan no kawas sanay ko imi no Kakawasan. Itiya ho, ira koya mipaliwalay to marad a patiyaman . Mi'aca ko Piwma a pasanga' to po'ot. Masamaanay ko demak i, mapatay koya tamdaw a mapatadem itira. Mafana' to ko finawlan nira i, looden naira kona paliwalay to marad halo niyaro'ay a tamdaw maemin. Mafolaw ko niyaro' to nikatapi' no Piwma. Dafongen no Piwma koya sapimarad noya patiyamay. Naikoran nona demak to pina to a mihecaan, mahadak ko namal nani sera. Deng o kawas ko mihaenay sa ko piharateng no 'Amis, mansa o kaitiraan no kawas kona pala sa to. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u kakawasan == itiraaj i fo~u-fo~uŋ-ɾi no~u po~uso~uŋ . itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kakawasan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kaitiraan no~u kawas sanaj ko~u imi no~u kakawasan. itija ħo~u, ira ko~uja mipaɾiwaɾaj to~u maraɬ~ɮ a patijaman . miʡaʦa ko~u piwma a pasaŋaʡ to~u po~uʡo~ut. masamaanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i, mapataj ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw a mapataɬ~ɮəm itira. mafanaʡ to~u ko~u finawɾan nira i, ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮən naira ko~una paɾiwaɾaj to~u maraɬ~ɮ ħaɾo~u nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maəmin. mafo~uɾaw ko~u nijaro~uʡ to~u nikatapiʡ no~u piwma. ɬ~ɮafo~uŋən no~u piwma ko~uja sapimaraɬ~ɮ no~uja patijamaj. naiko~uran no~una ɬ~ɮəmak to~u pina to~u a miħəʦaan, maħaɬ~ɮak ko~u namaɾ nani səra. ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u kawas ko~u miħaənaj sa ko~u piħaratəŋ no~u ʡamis, mansa o~u kaitiraan no~u kawas ko~una paɾa sa to~u. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
S.FORM: == O ngangan no Kakawasan == Itiraay i Fo-fong-li no Posong . Itiniay i Taitung Cen no Taitung ko Kakawasan a niyaro', 180 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 478 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 77% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 367 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 23% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 111 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 72%, Paiwan 1%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 2%, roma 1%. O kaitiraan no kawas sanay ko imi no Kakawasan. Itiya ho, ira koya mipaliwalay to marad a patiyaman . Mi'aca ko Piwma a pasanga' to po'ot. Masamaanay ko demak i, mapatay koya tamdaw a mapatadem itira. Mafana' to ko finawlan nira i, looden naira kona paliwalay to marad halo niyaro'ay a tamdaw maemin. Mafolaw ko niyaro' to nikatapi' no Piwma. Dafongen no Piwma koya sapimarad noya patiyamay. Naikoran nona demak to pina to a mihecaan, mahadak ko namal nani sera. Deng o kawas ko mihaenay sa ko piharateng no 'Amis, mansa o kaitiraan no kawas kona pala sa to. O katadamaanan no niyaro'
S.PHON: == o~u ŋaŋan no~u kakawasan == itiraaj i fo~u-fo~uŋ-ɾi no~u po~uso~uŋ . itiniaj i taito~u~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kakawasan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, ro~uma *%. o~u kaitiraan no~u kawas sanaj ko~u imi no~u kakawasan. itija ħo~u, ira ko~uja mipaɾiwaɾaj to~u maraɬ~ɮ a patijaman . miʡaʦa ko~u piwma a pasaŋaʡ to~u po~uʡo~ut. masamaanaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i, mapataj ko~uja tamɬ~ɮaw a mapataɬ~ɮəm itira. mafanaʡ to~u ko~u finawɾan nira i, ɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮən naira ko~una paɾiwaɾaj to~u maraɬ~ɮ ħaɾo~u nijaro~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maəmin. mafo~uɾaw ko~u nijaro~uʡ to~u nikatapiʡ no~u piwma. ɬ~ɮafo~uŋən no~u piwma ko~uja sapimaraɬ~ɮ no~uja patijamaj. naiko~uran no~una ɬ~ɮəmak to~u pina to~u a miħəʦaan, maħaɬ~ɮak ko~u namaɾ nani səra. ɬ~ɮəŋ o~u kawas ko~u miħaənaj sa ko~u piħaratəŋ no~u ʡamis, mansa o~u kaitiraan no~u kawas ko~una paɾa sa to~u. o~u kataɬ~ɮamaanan no~u nijaro~uʡ
